findings.evidence: `Trivial.lean` line 6 imports `Comodule.Hom`; its uses at lines 128-184 and 269-322 are plain `Hom`, `id`, `comp`, and ext, all defined in `Comodule.lean` lines 104-176, while `Comodule/Hom.lean` lines 37-70 starts the zero/add/smul morphism layer.
findings.fix: Replace the import with `import TauCeti.Algebra.Coalgebra.Comodule`; keep trivial comodules independent of the later additive hom-set API.
findings.issue: `Trivial.lean` imports `TauCeti.Algebra.Coalgebra.Comodule.Hom`, whose topic is additive/module structure on comodule morphisms, but this file only uses the base `Comodule.Hom`, `Hom.id`, `Hom.comp`, and ext API.

summary: The placement under the comodule hierarchy is natural, but the new file imports a later additive morphism layer it does not use.
